comment: Human-curated rulings. A ruled effect never counts as conversion loss AND never rides on gems. Add entries when 'pinned:'/'no-family fx:' lines name hidden machinery rather than real loot value.

waivedEffects.why: Summermyst implements ONE 'Drain Skills' enchantment as a visible primary (0x051143) plus 17 invisible per-skill PeakValueModifier workers (HideInUI). They are implementation machinery, not loot value. Unwaived they exceed the 4-rider cap, so every carrier fails the mint gate (convertibleItems==0) AND the items have no family to convert to — each blocks the other, stranding 2856 items as enchanted loot. Waiving the workers lets the visible primary mint a family and the items convert on it.
waivedEffects.revisit: If Summermyst restructures Drain Skills, re-derive from the no-family fx report.
